scripts.api:spec: echo "[placeholder] sync and validate OpenAPI spec at docs/api/openapi.yaml"
scripts.api:client: echo "[placeholder] generate client/types from orval.config.ts to src/lib/api/generated/"
scripts.api:check: echo "[placeholder] check api chain: docs/api/openapi.yaml + orval.config.ts + src/lib/api/generated/ + /docs/api"
scripts.db:migrate: tsx -e "import { getStorageClient } from './src/server/storage/client.ts'; const client = getStorageClient(); client.migrate(); client.close();"
scripts.db:check: drizzle-kit check && npm run db:drift && npm run typecheck && vitest run tests/unit/storage/schema.test.ts
scripts.db:drift: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && cp -R src/server/storage/migrations/meta "$tmpdir/meta" && drizzle-kit generate --out "$tmpdir" --name drift_check --prefix none >/tmp/subhub-drizzle-drift.log && if [ -f "$tmpdir/drift_check.sql" ]; then cat /tmp/subhub-drizzle-drift.log; echo 'Drizzle schema 与已提交 migration 存在漂移，请运行 npm run db:generate 并提交 migration。'; rm -rf "$tmpdir"; exit 1; fi; rm -rf "$tmpdir"
